changeSet.author: codex

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM email_template WHERE template_key = 'site.invitation' AND locale = 'default'

changeSet.comment: Seed default email template used by site invitation delivery

column.name: subject_template
column.value: Athena: You have been invited to ${siteTitle}

column.name: body_template
description
column.value: Plain-text notification sent when a manager invites a user to a collaboration site
